condition.applies_to: all floors of buildings 4 stories or taller

requirement.valve_location: inside stairway enclosure or smokeproof enclosure vestibule
requirement.exception_allows: valves placed elsewhere on the floor

rules.human_summary: LA: floor control valves go inside the stairway/smokeproof enclosure on each floor (exception: buildings ≤3 stories).

condition.applies_to: the definition of a water curtain in LA jurisdiction

requirement.definition: A line of closely spaced sprinklers at a fire-separation opening, working with a draft stop to keep fire on one side.

rules.human_summary: LA defines a water curtain: a row of sprinklers at an opening that, paired with a draft stop, keeps fire from spreading.

condition.applies_to: openings requiring fire separation in LA jurisdiction

rules.human_summary: LA water curtains: sprinklers max 6 ft apart along the opening, 6-12 in from a noncombustible draft stop ≥18 in deep.

condition.applies_to: buildings with no determined use at time of sprinkler design

rules.human_summary: LA: if the building's use is not yet known, design for at least Ordinary Hazard Group 2 over 3000 sqft.

condition.applies_to: high-rise buildings (>75 ft above lowest fire dept. access)

rules.human_summary: LA high-rise (>75 ft): redundant water supply required, min 15 psi and 500 gpm at the topmost sprinkler.
